channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mass Evacuations in Orange County After Chemical Tank Instability at Aerospace Facility
item.description: A rapidly escalating industrial emergency at GKN Aerospace in Garden Grove, California, forced tens of thousands of residents to evacuate as a compromised chemical tank continued to deteriorate. The i...

item.title: Wiebe helps Saskatchewan Roughriders secure comeback victory against Winnipeg Blue Bombers
item.description: The article reports on a Canadian football game in which the Saskatchewan Roughriders staged a comeback victory over the Winnipeg Blue Bombers, with Wiebe highlighted as the decisive hometown player w...

item.title: Tinubu Wins All Valid Votes in Ebonyi APC Presidential Primary Election
item.description: President Bola Tinubu record overwhelming victory for the All Progressives Congress (APC) presidential primary for Ebonyi State after he secured all 207,579 valid votes cast during the exercise. Accor...

item.title: Françoise Arnoul, a leading actress of 1950s French cinema
item.description: Françoise Arnoul (1931–2021) was a prominent French actress who rose to fame during the 1950s, a formative period for postwar European cinema. She became widely recognized as one of the era’s most cap...

item.title: African migrant women in South Africa face systemic exclusion while building support networks and livelihoods
item.description: The article examines the lived experiences of African migrant women in South Africa, particularly in Cape Town, where many continue to face xenophobia, institutional discrimination, and social exclusi...

item.title: Officials Race to Prevent Explosion at Overheating Chemical Tank in Orange County
item.description: A rapidly escalating chemical emergency at an aerospace facility in Garden Grove, Orange County, has raised fears of a potential explosion or large-scale toxic release. The crisis centers on a pressur...

item.title: How Arsenal’s ownership overhaul and Mikel Arteta’s appointment ended a 22-year Premier League title drought
item.description: Arsenal’s Premier League triumph, ending a 22-year wait for the title, is presented as the result of a long-term strategic overhaul led by the Kroenke family ownership. After years of fan unrest, part...

item.title: Archaeologists Question the 2,000-Year History of the Ifugao Rice Terraces
item.description: The article by anthropologist Stephen B. Acabado discusses the long-standing belief that the Ifugao Rice Terraces are around 2,000 years old and explains why many modern scholars now challenge this cl...

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party founder denies BJP claims of Pakistani followers, cites majority Indian audience
item.description: The founder of the internet-based movement Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), Abhijeet Dipke, has rejected allegations made by BJP leaders that a significant portion of the group’s social media followers ar...

item.title: ANC internal disagreements delay appointments to Phala Phala impeachment committee
item.description: The ANC has missed Parliament’s deadline to submit the names of MPs who will serve on the Phala Phala impeachment committee investigating President Cyril Ramaphosa. According to sources within Parliam...

item.title: Mike Johnson faces criticism over inaccurate claim about Iran negotiations involving Trump
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson faced widespread criticism after he posted a statement on social media praising former President Donald Trump’s role in international diplomacy with Iran. In his post on X, ...

item.title: UCTH CMD reports severe patient overload as 850-bed hospital serves over 5 million people and expands services
item.description: The Chief Medical Director (CMD) of the University of Calabar Teaching Hospital (UCTH), Prof. Ikpeme Ikpeme, has raised concern that the 850-bed tertiary hospital is seriously overstretched due to an ...

item.title: Pakistan urges immediate Ukraine ceasefire and protection of civilians at UN Security Council
item.description: Pakistan has called for an immediate ceasefire in the Ukraine war and urged renewed diplomatic engagement during an emergency session of the United Nations Security Council. Speaking at the meeting, P...

item.title: PM Shehbaz says Pakistan supports ongoing regional peace efforts after multination leaders’ call led by Trump
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said Pakistan remains committed to regional peace efforts after a high-level telephone conversation involving United States President Donald Trump and leaders from severa...

item.title: FAA clears Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket to resume flights after upper-stage anomaly
item.description: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket has been cleared to return to flight following a brief grounding triggered by a failure during its April launch. According to the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA), ...

item.title: US Justice Department removes web records of Jan 6 Capitol riot charges
item.description: The United States Department of Justice has reportedly removed hundreds of press releases from its official website that documented criminal charges against individuals involved in the January 6, 2021...

item.title: Nigeria Customs Says Human Oversight Remains Key as Digital Reforms Improve Revenue and Trade Efficiency
item.description: The Comptroller-General of the Nigeria Customs Service, Adewale Adeniyi, don emphasise say artificial intelligence and digital technologies must remain under strong human supervision to make sure gove...

item.title: Civil War Veteran Samuel Decker Created Functional Prosthetic Arms After Losing Both Forearms in Battle
item.description: Samuel H. Decker, a Union artilleryman who served during the American Civil War, became known for developing innovative prosthetic arms after suffering severe injuries in combat. In October 1862, duri...

item.title: Fans petition Sony to approve Destiny 3 as Destiny franchise winds down
item.description: A growing online petition is calling on Sony to greenlight Destiny 3 after recent reports suggest the Destiny franchise is entering a wind-down phase. According to the article, Bungie is ending major ...

item.title: My Hero Academia FINAL SEASON wins Anime of the Year at 2026 Anime Awards
item.description: ABS-CBN News reported on May 24, 2026, that the highly anticipated 2026 Anime Awards has named 'My Hero Academia FINAL SEASON' as Anime of the Year. The announcement was covered by journalist Jaehwa B...
